violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the store entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the reach-in units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Shelving must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

The floor in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. There are a couple of sections missing resulting in an inability to clean effectively. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floor is to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

The doors to the outside, located at the store entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
The handle of the walk-in cooler is not in good repair. The handle is broken resulting in an inability to open/close properly. Handle must be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the walk-in/reach-in coolers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Shelving is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

The floor in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. There is a section missing resulting in an inability to clean effectively. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floor is to be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
